debug_info.goal:
f : ℕ+ → ℕ+
h₀ : f 1 = 1
h₁ : f 3 = 3
h₂ : ∀ (n : ℕ+), f (2 * n) = f n
h₃ : ∀ (n : ℕ+), f (4 * n + 1) + f n = 2 * f (2 * n + 1)
h₄ : ∀ (n : ℕ+), f (4 * n + 3) + 2 * f n = 3 * f (2 * n + 1)
A : Finset ↑{n | n ≤ 1988 ∧ f n = n}
⊢ A.card = Imo1988P3.solution

proof:
have h : ∀ n, f n = n ↔ n % 4 ∈ {1, 3} := by
    intro n
    induction' n using Nat.strongRecOn with n ih
    cases' n with n
    · simp
    cases' n with n
    · simp [h₀]
    cases' n with n
    · simp [h₁]
    cases' Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one (n + 2) with h₂' h₂'
    · rw [← Nat.mul_div_cancel' h₂', h₂]
      simp [ih _ (Nat.div_lt_self (by simp) (by simp))]
    · cases' Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one (n + 1) with h₃' h₃'
      · rw [← Nat.mul_div_cancel' h₃', h₃, ih _ (Nat.div_lt_self (by simp) (by simp))]
        simp [Nat.mul_div_cancel' h₃']
      · rw [← Nat.mul_div_cancel' h₃', h₄, ih _ (Nat.div_lt_self (by simp) (by simp))]
        simp [Nat.mul_div_cancel' h₃']
  simp [h, solution]
